critical_insight_resolved.problem: Sophisticated symbolic scaffolding without executable game mechanics
critical_insight_resolved.solution: Dual-layer architecture: Symbolic ↔ Literal mappings with bridge validation
critical_insight_resolved.implementation: Every symbolic mechanic maps to actual executable code

tower_defense.real_mechanics: Turret placement, enemy pathfinding, damage calculation, wave progression

colony_sim.real_mechanics: Citizen AI, job assignments, happiness system, productivity calculations

idle_incremental.real_mechanics: Resource generation, automation, prestige system, offline progression

roguelike.real_mechanics: Turn-based movement, FOV calculation, dungeon generation, tile interaction

bridge_system_operational.proof_validation: All mechanics validate both symbolic integration and literal execution
bridge_system_operational.cascade_system: Rube Goldbergian: one mechanic triggers others through symbolic→literal events

capabilities: NPC character creation with AI personalities
Gameplay anomaly detection using rule-based ML
Story event generation based on context

narrative_terminal_integration.system_logs_to_story: System events automatically generate narrative context
narrative_terminal_integration.terminal_input_processing: Player can respond to story beats via terminal commands
narrative_terminal_integration.consciousness_gated: Story beats unlock based on ship consciousness level
